roots.name: content

roots.name: contracts
roots.current_role: Current canonical target root for the source repository layout.

roots.current_role: Allowed root-level project file.
roots.notes: Allowed root file.

roots.name: control
roots.current_role: Current runtime/AppShell/platform-adjacent root retained until runtime convergence.
roots.notes: Control substrate must preserve process-only mutation boundaries.

roots.name: core
roots.current_role: Current runtime/AppShell/platform-adjacent root retained until runtime convergence.
roots.notes: Core is likely mixed; do not move wholesale.

roots.name: data
roots.current_role: Current content, data, pack, profile, or export-adjacent root retained until split review.
roots.notes: Data contains registries, content, planning mirrors, and generated evidence; split by authority.

roots.name: dist
roots.current_role: Generated, ephemeral, or release-adjacent output root.

roots.notes: Distribution output is governed by distribution contracts, not source repo layout.
